memory.summary: I initially planned to finish the assignment analysis and reading, but a friend invited me to lunch with the cohort.
I made progress on the assignment analysis, but my friend's message suggests the cohort is gathering now for lunch.
I made progress on the analysis section, but I am now under significant time pressure as the deadline is less than an hour away.
I spent 0.5 hours on the assignment analysis, raising progress to 0.75, but with the deadline under an hour away and low energy, I am still behind schedule.
I missed the 18:00 deadline for the analysis section with only 78% progress, despite working through my low energy and stress.
I worked for 1.5 hours and reached 84% progress, but the deadline has passed, leaving me with unfinished work despite my effort.
I made slight progress on the assignment but failed to complete it before the deadline. The assigned reading is also completely unfinished, compounding my missed obligations.
I made progress on the analysis section, but it is now 22:30 and I am exhausted with a high stress level.
I continued working at 23:00, pushing the analysis section to 95% progress, yet my energy is now effectively zero and stress remains high.
Despite reaching 96% progress on the analysis section, my energy is now zero and stress remains critically high after working late.
I worked another 0.5 hours at midnight, pushing the analysis to 98% complete, but my energy remains depleted and stress is still high.
The analysis section is finally complete, but my energy is zero and stress remains high after working through the night.
